channel.title: Milanjovanovic.tech on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Milanjovanovic.tech on .NET Ramblings

item.title: How to Implement Two-Factor Authentication in ASP.NET Core
item.description: Passwords alone are not enough. Learn how to implement Two-Factor Authentication in .NET using TOTP, QR codes, and the Otp.NET library, with a secure setup flow and encrypted secrets at rest. Link to article: https://www.milanjovanovic.tech/blog/how-to-implement-two-factor-authentication-in-aspnetcore

item.title: Where Vertical Slices Fit Inside the Modular Monolith Architecture
item.description: Modular Monolith tells you how to split the system into modules. But it says nothing about how to organize code inside each module. Vertical Slice Architecture fills that gap, and the combination is incredibly powerful. Link to article: https://www.milanjovanovic.tech/blog/where-vertical-slices-fit-inside-the-modular-monolith-architecture
